summary: Full backend and frontend testing of AutoGestão SaaS app. All 14 backend API tests pass. Frontend flows tested: landing page, login, admin dashboard, mechanics management, register page.

minor.issue: Login response returns user fields at root level (not nested under 'user' key). Minor inconsistency but works fine.

issues: Premium plan shows '1limitado' (missing space) instead of '1 limitado' or 'ilimitado'

action_items: Minor: Fix register page Premium plan text - '1limitado' should be 'Ilimitado' or 'Ilimitados'
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1006 lines - consider splitting into routers (auth, services, mechanics, billing, reports)
CORS allow_origins includes wildcard '*' from CORS_ORIGINS env - could be a security issue in production
Login response returns user fields at top level while the comment/doc implies nested 'user' key - standardize response format
seed_data_creation: TEST_Mechanic Silva, TEST_Cliente Teste, TEST_Oficina Teste created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working. Frontend login → redirect → dashboard works. Mechanics add via modal works. Register page shows all 3 plans correctly. Asaas payment API not configured (expected). Auth uses httpOnly cookies.
